title: LEFT JOIN malfunctions with partial ISNULL index
poc: CREATE INDEX i0 ON t0(1) WHERE c0 ISNULL;
SELECT * FROM t1 LEFT JOIN t0 WHERE t0.c0 ISNULL;
SELECT t0.c0 ISNULL FROM t1 LEFT JOIN t0;
key_bug_features: LEFT JOIN with partial ISNULL index malfunctions
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c0 INTEGER, c1 TEXT, c2 REAL);
CREATE INDEX i1 ON t2(c0) WHERE c1 ISNULL;
INSERT INTO t2(c0, c1, c2) VALUES (NULL, 'test', 3.14);
INSERT INTO t2(c0, c1, c2) VALUES (2, NULL, 2.71);
SELECT * FROM t2 LEFT JOIN t0 ON t2.c0 = t0.c0 WHERE t2.c1 ISNULL;
